rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings and assignments.
Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks without altering component type or feature structure.
generic_rules: Use component implementation annexes for implementation-specific AGREE contracts.
Avoid modifying component type structures when inserting implementation-level annexes.
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are syntactically valid within AADL context.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings and assignments belong in component implementation annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level AGREE contracts in component type annexes.
Do not alter component type structure when inserting implementation annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction for component types and features
